description_long: This playground structure features a raised platform with a gabled green roof, supported by wooden posts. One side of the structure has a wide, straight slide made of light gray material, while the opposite side features a staircase with yellow handrails and wooden steps. The platform is enclosed by vertical slats for safety, and a decorative clock face is visible on one side, adding an educational element. The structure is elevated, with black footings at the base of each post for stability. The overall design is compact, combining climbing, sliding, and imaginative play elements, and is suitable for placement in parks or urban play areas.
description: A compact multi-play structure with a green roof, slide, stairs, and safety railings, designed for children's play in urban parks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the slide descending from the raised platform, with the roof and safety railings visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the staircase with yellow handrails, the slide extending to the left, and a decorative clock face on the structure.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the staircase leading up to the platform and the back of the slide, with the roof overhead.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the slide extending to the right, the staircase, and the clock face on the structure.
